name: Texture Powder
description: A reworkable fine dry styling powder that adds volume and texture with a matte effect.
howToUse: Lightly sprinkle powder into palms of the hand, distribute through dry hair, rubbing gently with fingertips to create body and texture with a matte finish.
ingredients: Glycerin, Silica, Aqua, VP/VA Copolymer, Sodium Benzoate.
